title: Singapore compensation: SGD-dominated, structured pay mix, comprehensive benefits
summary: SGD dominance at 98.3%, with monthly reporting at 94.6%. Base salary share decreases with seniority from 90.5% (Junior IC) to 83.7% (Head/Senior Leadership). Stock options peak at 4.3% for Heads, bonus peaks at 11.3% at Head level. Benefits are more comprehensive than region: Health insurance 52.0%, Leave benefits 32.4%, Professional development 23.5%, Dental 23.3%, Flexible work 22.1%, Transport 12.6%, Home office 10.7%.
methodology: Self-reported compensation structure, currency, benefits, and pay frequency in anonymous online survey, filtered to Singapore-based respondents
